title: Member names should not be duplicated within a class or object literal
description: Duplicate property names in classes and object literals should be avoided as the last occurrence will overwrite previous definitions, potentially causing bugs and confusion. Each member name should be unique within its scope to ensure predictable behavior and code clarity.
recommendation: Remove duplicate property names and ensure each member has a unique name within its class or object literal.

checks.message: Duplicate property name found in object literal - each property should have a unique name
Duplicate method name found in class - each method should have a unique name
